summary: Tested new Burning Session feature. All 31 tests passed (16 backend + 15 frontend). Feature correctly burns 1% of PRC balance daily, stops at 10,000 PRC minimum, and displays live burn counter on Mining page.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user UID: cbdf46d7-7d66-4d43-8495-e1432a2ab071 with balance > 10,000 PRC
context_for_next_testing_agent: Burning Session feature fully tested and working. Backend API at GET /api/burning-session/status/{uid} returns burn rates and applies burns on each call. Frontend Mining page displays live burn counter that updates every second. All calculations verified: burn_per_second = balance * 0.01 / 86400.

features_tested.backend_api_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/burning-session/status/{uid} returns 200 with valid structure
features_tested.days_until_minimum: PASS - Correctly calculates days until 10,000 PRC reached
features_tested.burn_application: PASS - Burns are applied when API is called
features_tested.frontend_burning_session_card: PASS - Displays on Mining page with fire emoji
features_tested.frontend_live_status: PASS - Shows LIVE badge when burning active
features_tested.frontend_burn_rates_display: PASS - Shows Per Hour and Per Day burn rates
features_tested.frontend_days_until_minimum: PASS - Shows days until 10,000 PRC minimum
